name: gm-lore-parser
author: Zandao
description: System-agnostic GM toolkit. A lorebook-hosted System Definition ([SYSTEM_DEF]) declares the ruleset; a unified [ENTITY] engine drives player/NPC/companion/creature stat blocks; [ABILITY] unifies boons/titles/passives/evolution. Maintains lorebooks, character state, skills, factions, quests, currency, needs, and a live status panel. Modular build — logic in modules/ loaded at runtime.
